description: Originally launched on Ethereum in Q1 2020, Aave (AAVE) is the native token of Aave, a decentralized finance protocol for crypto lending and borrowing. Now, as a 1:1 price-indexing token on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 AAVE gives original AAVE holders, users, and traders instant finality, ultra-low fees, and AI contract capability for faster, more secure, and more scalable financial use worldwide.
name: Aave Token
